footer.disclaimer: AI-assisted legal research — not legal advice. Verify all citations and consult a qualified advocate.

agents.title: AI Agents
agents.subtitle: Autonomous legal research and case preparation assistants

research.title: Research Agent
research.description: Ask a legal question. The agent decomposes it into sub-queries, searches across case law in parallel, detects contradictions between holdings, and generates a structured research memo with citations.
research.tagline: Legal question to research memo with citations

casePrep.title: Case Prep Agent
casePrep.description: Select a previously analyzed document. The agent prioritizes issues by legal strength, performs deeper precedent searches through citation graphs, and generates a strategy memo with recommended argument ordering.
casePrep.tagline: Uploaded case to strategy memo with precedents

strategy.title: Argument Builder
strategy.description: Enter case facts and desired relief. The agent generates IRAC-structured arguments with verified precedents, adversarial counter-analysis, and a litigation-ready argument memorandum.
strategy.tagline: Case facts to IRAC arguments with counter-analysis

drafting.title: Drafting Agent
drafting.description: Select a document type — bail applications, writ petitions, written statements, and more. The agent drafts the document grounded in verified precedents and current statutory provisions.
drafting.tagline: Bail applications, writ petitions, and more

cookieConsent.message: We use essential cookies for authentication and preferences.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account, preferences, and application settings

profile.title: Profile & Account
profile.description: Manage your personal information and account security
profile.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
profile.deleteWarning: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.

preferences.title: Research Preferences
preferences.caseTypesHelp: Add a case type (e.g., Civil, Criminal)
preferences.actsHelp: Add an act name (e.g., IPC, CPC)

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Customize the look and feel of the application
appearance.languageNote: Changing language will reload the page

notifications.title: Notifications & AI
notifications.description: Configure alerts and AI behavior preferences
notifications.emailAlertsHelp: Receive email notifications for important updates

verbosity.comprehensive: Comprehensive — Full analysis with all context

notifications.verbosityHelp: Controls the level of detail in research agent responses
notifications.responseLanguageHelp: Language for AI-generated content (research memos, chat responses)

billing.upgradeDescription: Premium plans with priority processing, higher limits, and team features are coming soon.
